hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$FILE" == *.go ]]; then RESULT=$(cd /home/automatedtomato/github.com/automatedtomato/mesh-ant/meshant && go vet ./... 2>&1); if [ -n "$RESULT" ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; r,f=sys.argv[1],sys.argv[2]; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'go vet found issues after editing '+f+':\n\n'+r}}))" "$RESULT" "$FILE"; else python3 -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'go vet: clean'}}))"; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "gh pr merge"; then OUTPUT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('tool_response',{}).get('output',''))" 2>/dev/null); MEMDIR="/home/automatedtomato/.claude/projects/-home-automatedtomato-github-com-automatedtomato-mesh-ant/memory"; python3 -c "import json,sys; cmd,out,memdir=sys.argv[1],sys.argv[2],sys.argv[3]; msg='A pull request was just merged.
Command: '+cmd+'
Output: '+out.strip()+'

Please update the project memory files in '+memdir+'/ to reflect this merge. Update phase/milestone progress, mark completed issues, and update MEMORY.md as appropriate.'; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':msg}}))" "$CMD" "$OUTPUT" "$MEMDIR"; fi
